entries.title: President Trump said U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement officers should continue using traffic stops to arrest immigrants, reversing a recent decision by the agency

Almost three years after he took over as House speaker, Mike Johnson’s job is more overwhelming than ever: “All I do is go from crisis to crisis…”
